name: Tim Kaine
subject: The saddest day of my life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek -- The saddest day of my life came on April 16, 2007, the day I learned that 32 people had been killed, and 17 injured, in a mass shooting at Virginia Tech. As Virginia's governor, it was my solemn duty to comfort both the victims' families and our grieving Commonwealth.

The perpetrator in the Virginia Tech shooting was able to buy his guns due to a background check loophole. For over 10 years, I have been fighting to close loopholes so that we can prevent more gun deaths. But I need your help, Derek.

**[Will you add your name to call on Congress to require background checks on every gun purchase?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=LwGxrTXieZQbFcEVBtZcWvNzlKANgZrW)**

Despite widespread support for universal background checks from the American public, including gun owners, Republicans in Congress have refused to take action. Sadly, many of them would rather give in to the wishes of fringe organizations than work to save lives.

Today, too many dangerous people can easily access guns, including domestic abusers and convicted felons. Nearly every day, we hear about yet another senseless murder or suicide that could have been prevented. The stories are heartbreaking.

And for those of us fighting to end gun violence, they only strengthen our resolve. I won't ever stop working to make Virginians safer. Are you on my side, Derek? **[Let me know by adding your name to call on Congress to require universal background checks for all gun purchases.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ANLvE0owZ0FSOTewOSN1v9JsgIbfQUBd)**

Thank you,
Tim
| Paid for by Paid for by Kaine for Virginia

What we did. |

Friend, We were “not supposed to win.” The media said that Hillary was supposed to be president. Obama’s legacy was supposed to continue. Our border was supposed to stay wide open. Our economy was supposed to stay rigged. Our massive bureaucratic state was supposed to grow even bigger. But there was one problem...The American people had a different plan for our country. And here in America, We The People always have the final word. You demanded change. You demanded a new direction that puts America First. You wanted to see America win again. And as YOUR president, I’m working every single day to ensure your dreams become our country’s future. But those same people that said we weren’t supposed to win are now trying to destroy everything you and I have built. That’s why we set goals EVERY single month to ensure we have the resources to fight back against any and all attacks. Now I need you to step up and protect what we’ve already achieved and everything we will accomplish over the next three years. _Begin forwarded message:_

> Friend,
>
> With the news last week that disgraced state Senator Artiles resigned, a special election is set to be held to fill his seat.
>

name: Phillip Thompson
subject: Day 56
body:
#
Team --
Fifty-six days ago, we launched an improbable campaign for Governor of Florida, with no money, a candidate without a famous name, and zero pundits believing we could win.
We still felt that this campaign was winnable though -- and if you've ever had the pleasure of meeting Andrew Gillum, you know why. Because even when the odds have been against him, he's always figured out a way to rise above and beyond all expectations.
In the past 56 days, we've learned that the same can be said of all of you. Before one of our first campaign stops, in The Villages, one of the reddest communities in the state, we warned Andrew that it would likely be a smaller group, maybe fifty people, certainly less than one hundred. **Over five hundred people showed up, and we ran out of chairs.**
Just last week, in the bright red county of Brevard, we tried to warn him of the same thing, and he laughed.**Once again, you proved us wrong, and over 400 people showed up.**
So when we told him that we were behind on our fundraising goal this month, he didn't look worried at all, and I'm not worried either. Because again and again, you all have shown us that you are ready and willing to do whatever it takes to turn this improbable campaign into a probable victory. We believe in you just as much as you believe in us. And that's why I'm reaching out today, to remind you:
[**We have an end of month fundraising deadline quickly approaching. Will you contribute $20.18 or whatever you can afford to help us reach our goal and keep up the momentum we need to win?**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3397/9e00690/48266de7/24034d53/2112557472/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-april2017?refcode=em20170427-56days-a")
Thank you for making the last 56 days nothing short of incredible. Together, we're going to rise above all expectations once again, and win back Florida.
Bring it home,

Phillip Thompson
Andrew Gillum for Governor
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3397/9e00690/48266de7/24034d53/2112557472/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-april2017?refcode=em20170427-56days-a")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3397/9e00690/48266de7/24034d52/2112557472/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3397/9e00690/48266de7/24034d55/2112557472/VEsC/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3397/9e00690/48266de7/24034d54/2112557472/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")

Please make a contribution of just $1 before April 29th to land your spot on my list of 100-Day Members. body:
We have to add our voices to stop this dangerous process.

| [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTA5MDU0MDYS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE0MjE4MDQ5NQS2&mt=1&rt=0) Friend, Across the nation, we are seeing what Republicans are willing to do when they have power in government. They will take health care away from those who need it. They will turn a blind eye to climate change. They will refuse to provide refuge for those in need -- while putting those same people's lives in danger. And if that wasn't enough, they are determined to _grab more power_ by whatever unethical, desperate means they have. **And that means gerrymandering districts to silence voters, lock Democrats out of office, and create a system where politicians pick their voters instead of voters picking their politicians.** From governors' races to the presidential level, they are strong-arming their way into office. This practice is undemocratic and it is unacceptable. And it is eating away at the base of our democracy. We can no longer stand by while Republicans take our voices away from us. That's why I'm joining with governors across the nation to fight to unrig the map and end gerrymandered districts -- and I need your help. [**Will you support us in our fight to protect Democratic voters and tell the GOP to end gerrymandered districts?**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTA5MDU0MDYS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE0MjE4MDQ5NQS2&mt=1&rt=0) Voting should display the will of the people, _not_ the will of a few Republicans who think their partisan agendas are more important than fair and balanced elections. name: Jill Vogel for Lieutenant Governor
subject: Sen. Mark Obenshain Endorses Jill Vogel for Lieutenant Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
April 27th, 2017
Senator Mark Obenshain Endorses Jill Vogel for Lieutenant GovernorHARRISONBURG, VA - Today, Senator Jill Vogel, Republican candidate for Lieutenant Governor, received the endorsement of Senator Mark Obenshain, an influential conservative leader who serves as co-chairman of Virginia's Senate Republican Caucus and who was the Virginia GOP's 2013 nominee for Attorney General.Obenshain praised Vogel for her conservative record and endorsed her before a crowd of almost 200 at his annual "Oysters with Obenshain" social, a family-friendly event known for being one of the Shenandoah Valley's largest regular political gatherings."Jill Vogel has the character, qualifications, and leadership to win statewide," said Senator Mark Obenshain. "I have worked in the Senate with Jill for nearly a decade and she epitomizes what it means to be a public servant and a leader who gets things done. She works selflessly for the people she serves. She is a team player and will work with anyone, never worrying about who gets the credit. Jill is a fighter and has passed bills no one thought would ever succeed -- like defeating Obamacare's individual mandate in Virginia and protecting our Second Amendment rights. I'm proud to endorse a native of the Valley to lead statewide and I urge Virginia Republicans to join me in voting to nominate Jill Vogel for Lieutenant Governor on June 13th.""Earning Mark Obenshain's endorsement is a tremendous honor," responded Senator Jill Vogel. "I admire him as a statesman and as a person who is fair, committed, and never compromises his principles. His name is synonymous with the fight for conservative values and personal freedom. In Virginia, Senator Obenshain is the most respected statewide Republican leader, having recently run the strongest statewide campaign against an avalanche of liberal national money. He won that race in the hearts of Virginians and he has been a hero to our party. I am honored to have his endorsement."Senator Obenshain represents the twenty-sixth district in the Virginia Senate. The district includes the city of Harrisonburg and the counties of Warren, Shenandoah, Page, Rappahannock and Rockingham (part).###

name: Shannon Jackson, Our Revolution
subject: CA single-payer bill SB 562 passes committee vote!
body:
Our Revolution volunteers have been calling and texting voters and legislators, organizing, and rallying across the state and the country in favor of the universal health care bill
#
Friends,
Ever since SB 562, the Healthy California Act, was introduced in the California State Senate, Our Revolution volunteers have been calling and texting voters and legislators, organizing, and rallying across the state and the country in favor of the universal health care bill -- and our efforts are beginning to pay off.
Yesterday, the Senate Health Committee voted 5-2 in favor of SB 562. **This is yuuuge.** Now the bill advances to the Senate Appropriations Committee, so we need to keep pushing until universal health care is enshrined in California law.
[**Can you chip in $5 to help Our Revolution continue our push for universal health care? Your contribution helps us gather support for Medicare for All to connect voters with their elected officials and rally supporters at state capitols like we did yesterday in Sacramento.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d25/43f17890/dacd1bc4/6203b2ea/3916869596/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sb-562?refcode=em170427-full")
Alongside the California Nurses Association and countless grassroots organizations and activists, we are on the brink of establishing health care as a human right for all in California. A major victory like this can turn the tide on the national health care debate.
A majority of Americans are in favor of Medicare for All, but the news media spends far more time covering the Republican's lamentable health care plan instead of presenting the public with its increasingly viable alternative. We've had enough of paying more for prescription drugs, premiums, deductibles, and copayments than people in countries with universal health care. We're fed up with getting fleeced by insurance and pharmaceutical industries that lobby the State Senate and our Congress against Medicare for All and rake in billions of dollars in profit. That's why so many people support SB 562, which would eliminate out-of-pocket costs and extend coverage to undocumented immigrants.
[**We are on track to win this fight. Your $5 donation helps us continue our organizing efforts and rally even more support for health care as a human right.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d25/43f17890/dacd1bc4/6203b2ea/3916869596/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sb-562?refcode=em170427-full")
Universal health care is one of the great moral issues of our time. With your help, we can guarantee that to all Californians, and soon all Americans.
In solidarity,
Shannon Jackson
Executive Director
Our Revolution
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d25/43f17890/dacd1bc4/6203b2ea/3916869596/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sb-562?refcode=em170427-full")**

WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd71/2a380d31/157069f4/fef92d/2805122452/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd71/2a380d31/157069f4/fef92d/2805122452/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hello,
The Trump administration is coming up on its 100th day in office, and we're running a short approval poll about Donald Trump and his top officials.
[**Will you answer these 5 questions about Donald Trump, Steve Bannon, and Sean Spicer?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd71/2a380d31/157069f4/fef92e/2805122452/VEsF/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170412_100days-approval-poll_nd?source=e20170427_100approval1-rs_ns-nd")
Steve Bannon, Trump's chief strategist and former heard of _Breitbart News_ , is known for his anti-Semitic, bigoted, misogynistic, and homophobic agenda. As Trump's right-hand man, he's in the Oval Office influencing policy decisions.
Sean Spicer, the White House press secretary, hits President Obama every chance he gets. He repeats baseless and discredited attacks like that Obama wiretapped Trump tower, and his bumbling around concerns that Russia interfered with the 2016 election have made him a regular feature on _Saturday Night Live._
Donald Trump's Supreme Court nominee was just rammed through the Senate and confirmed with almost no bipartisan support. Trump has also spent his first months in office attacking health care, imposing un-American travel bans, and quietly tearing away our right to Internet privacy.
**Team, your opinion is important to us.[Will you please take this short approval poll before the Trump administration reaches its 100th day in office?](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd71/2a380d31/157069f4/fef92e/2805122452/VEsC/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170412_100days-approval-poll_nd?source=e20170427_100approval1-rs_ns-nd")**
Thanks for sharing your thoughts,
Team Maggie
